data.name: Sexbot
data.detailed_description:
Sexbot is an adult visual novel, full of robots, weird science, time travel and you guessed it; SEX!

Play as a nerdy college student trying to get a date for the homecoming dance. Just when it looks like you are doomed to a life of perpetual virginity, sexual salvation arrives in the form of the humanoid robot; Alexa. With only one week to calibrate Alexa before the dance, your choices will determine what kind of date you're going to get. But the more time you spend with her, it becomes increasingly obvious she is not a basic Sexbot model and something more sinister is lurking in the shadows. When things don't go as planned at the dance, she brings you back in time, to give you another chance.

The time travel mechanic in Sexbot allows you to make new choices, explore new paths, and experience new events (without having to save scum your way through). The best of Groundhog's day, but with a user friendly interface, that has been lubed up specifically to eliminate "the grind". The cast of Sexbot expands as you play, and you can pursue all of ridiculously attractive characters. However, your actions are not without consequence. Big events cause ripples through the timelines, permanently altering character's relationships to you, and each other, unlocking trophies and even more possibilities.

The story and characters feel like they are straight out of a teen comedy, and the sex feels like it's straight out of a movie nerd's wet dream. It's a combination of the awkward years of coming of age, and the stuff you wish you could do back in college. With the added kick of Alexa's magic box ' o' science, you're going to see boob expansion, butt expansion, Amazonian transformations, robot duplication, kinky outfits, erotic roleplay, pushing the limits all the way to a MILF/muppet double penetration three-way! (admit it, you're at least curious now)

Sexbot Features

  • Several hundred super sexy, smooth animations

  • Custom names for characters and relationships

  • Top quality renders

  • Non-clunky, wait- is that a word? De-clunked dialogue that isn't a pain to read

  • A replay gallery for more than 150 steamy scenes

  • Character stat pages that evolve as you play

  • Unlockable trophies with extra spicy pics

As the creator and solo developer of Sexbot, I made this game to be everything I thought was missing from adult sex games. Not only imaginative and unique sex scenes, but a real story too. The goal was to have tons of options, without being limited to just a few. Wacky, hilarious situations that were still relatable. Fetish content, that is all labelled and avoidable if you prefer. This game was made to be fun, and I hope you enjoy!

data.short_description: Can't find a date for the homecoming dance? Then order AmaZone's Alexa today! Our newest version of Alexa is a super sexy humanoid robot ready to follow your every command! *AmaZone is not responsible for Alexa AI sentience or robo-hostility, or global destruction

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.legal_notice: All characters in this game are fictional robots or humans, not related to each other, and over the age of 18.
